title: 👉5Day Work ! Beauty Sales Advisor *High Commission*🎁
description:
🌟 BEAUTY SALES ADVISOR (ROADSHOW EXPERIENCE PREFERRED) *High Commission*

About Us

Apex Retail Pte Ltd is a fast-growing retail company in Singapore, committed to delivering high-quality beauty products and exceptional customer experiences. We provide a supportive, professional, and growth-oriented environment where ambitious individuals can learn, excel, and advance their careers.

Job Description

  • We are expanding our roadshow and retail sales team and are looking for dynamic Beauty Sales Promoters who:
  • Engage and approach customers confidently at roadshows and retail locations
  • Present and recommend skincare products in a persuasive and professional manner
  • Close sales and achieve individual performance targets
  • Build strong customer relationships and deliver exceptional service

Salary & Benefits

  • Base Salary: $3,500 – $4,500 (based on experience)
  • High Commission (Unlimited): Up to $10,000 – $15,000 per month
  • CPF contributions provided

Staff Benefits:

  • Birthday Leave
  • Medical Insurance Coverage
  • Leave entitlements in accordance with MOM requirements
  • Welcome Lunch, Team Bonding Activities, and Festive/Event Celebrations

Requirements

  • Singaporean / PR / LTVP only
  • Sales-driven, confident in approaching customers
  • Roadshow / beauty / direct sales experience preferred
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills
  • Positive attitude, resilient, and target-oriented

📍 Work Locations: Orchard / Jurong

🕒 Shift Hours: 10:00am – 7:00pm | 11:30am – 8:30pm | 12:30pm – 9:30pm

📆 Work Schedule: 5 days per week with 8 off-days per month

Be part of a team that values teamwork, integrity, and efficiency.Find out more at https://apexretail.com.sg/

postedCompany.description:
Founded in 2007, Apex Retail brings premium international skincare brands to prestigious Asian markets. Over the years, we expanded extensively on our product offerings, retail channels as well as our growing team to meet the ever-changing needs and demands of the market. To ensure our products and services quality, each of the brands undergoes careful selections from the most exclusive international sources for their luxurious, unique, and effective ingredients which differentiates us from our competitors. Building high-end retail concept stores at premium locations further aid in developing brand values that attract customers and their loyalty.


Apex Retail also prided itself in its first-class customer service with the highest customer satisfaction guaranteed. We house a strong team of customer service officers who specializes in handling all customer inquiries, needs, and expectations. The combination of top-quality products and customer service has brought the company to where it is today - a successful luxury beauty and skincare retailer in Asia, with over 140 employees across Singapore and Hong Kong!


We believe in establishing a long and successful journey with our team members, taking the company and each other to new heights.  Therefore, we train and support the team and make efforts to make the company a place where everyone can thrive.


What are you waiting for? Click Apply to join and be a part of Singapore's TOP Leading Retailer Group!


Would you like to hear more from us? Click on the link below:

https://www.apexretail.com.sg/get-to-know-us
postedCompany.name: APEX RETAIL PTE. LTD.
